name: 真相大白（皇帝秘密揭露）
description: 皇帝當朝揭露自己因童年創傷導致的親密恐懼症，唯獨對女主例外。這個真相讓前期所有的冷漠和拒絕都獲得了全新解讀，觀眾從恨皇帝變為心疼皇帝，情感衝擊極大。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: When I was over 10 years old, the Empress Daager secretly arranged for me a palace maid who was experienced in intimacy... I was terrified back then... I developed a certain affliction. As soon as I get close to a woman, I feel nothing but disgust... However, Laura Lake is the exception.
